message:
fix(security): hash collision + digest bypass in replay_capsule, claim_compiler, migration_pipeline

- replay_capsule.rs (bd-18qn3): Replace pipe-delimited hash construction with
  length-prefixed encoding via compute_inputs_hash() using domain separator
  and per-field length prefixes to prevent hash collision attacks
- claim_compiler.rs (bd-2tztq): Add compilation_digest verification in
  publish_batch() to prevent evidence-text binding bypass
- migration_pipeline.rs: Replace pre-joined pipe-delimited artifact hash
  input with individual field extension to prevent delimiter collision

3 regression tests added for each fix. All tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
